title: dolicholus totta
intro: Dolicholus totta, also known as 'Umckaloabo', is a plant species native to Southern Africa, particularly in South Africa and Namibia. The medicinal properties of Dolicholus totta lie in its ability to treat respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include providing relief from coughs and congestion, as well as reducing the severity of cold and flu symptoms. Dolicholus totta is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory ailments.
